title: Buying Quality With General Dynamics
text: In this article, we start by taking a look at the importance of owning high-quality companies, given a very tricky market environment. General Dynamics is one of the best places to be as it has a somewhat anti-cyclical business model and the ability to generate high free cash flow.

title: General Dynamics (GD) Q3 Earnings Top, Revenues Rise Y/Y
text: General Dynamics' (GD) third-quarter revenues of $9,975 million beat the Zacks Consensus Estimate of $9,919 million by 0.6%. Revenues improve 4.3% from the year-ago quarter.

title: General Dynamics Corporation (GD) Q3 2022 Earnings Call Transcript
text: General Dynamics Corporation (NYSE:GD ) Q3 2022 Earnings Conference Call October 26, 2022 9:00 AM ET Company Participants Howard Rubel - VP, IR Phebe Novakovic - Chairman and CEO Jason Aiken - SVP and CFO Conference Call Participants Seth Seifman - JPMorgan David Strauss - Barclays Ron Epstein - Bank of America Merrill Lynch Robert Stallard - Vertical Research Myles Walton - Wolfe Research George Shapiro - Shapiro Research Kristine Liwag - Morgan Stanley Cai von Rumohr - Cowen Kenneth Herbert - RBC Capital Markets Doug Harned - Bernstein Scott Deuschle - Credit Suisse Operator Good morning and welcome to the General Dynamics Third Quarter 2022 Earnings Conference Call. All participants will be in a listen-only mode.

title: General Dynamics (GD) Q3 Earnings and Revenues Surpass Estimates
text: General Dynamics (GD) delivered earnings and revenue surprises of 3.16% and 0.56%, respectively, for the quarter ended September 2022. Do the numbers hold clues to what lies ahead for the stock?

title: Will Segment Sales Aid General Dynamics (GD) Q3 Earnings?
text: General Dynamics' (GD) Q3 results are likely to reflect a strong growth performance across most of its business segments.

title: General Dynamics (GD) Wins $18.1M Deal for Trident II SWS
text: General Dynamics' (GD) business unit clinches an $18.1-million deal to provide support services for the Trident II Strategic Weapon System.

title: General Dynamics to Webcast 2022 Third-Quarter Financial Results Conference Call
text: RESTON, Va. , Oct. 7, 2022 /PRNewswire/ -- General Dynamics (NYSE: GD) will webcast its third-quarter 2022 financial results conference call on Wednesday, October 26, beginning at 9 a.m.

title: General Dynamics Is A Secular Winner In A Growing Industry
text: General Dynamics has been a strong performer over the past year as Russia's war on Ukraine has increased defense spending expectations. Indeed, a large increase in the Pentagon budget is likely.

title: General Dynamics (GD) Wins Virginia-Class Navy Submarine Deal
text: General Dynamics' (GD) business unit, General Dynamics Electric Boat, clinches a $533-million modification contract to support Virginia-class submarines.
